data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Emergency override (manager can force assignment)' but did not provide any evidence confirming that this functionality exists or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate its implementation or availability. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an emergency override feature allowing managers to force assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
